refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use robust error detection and correction protocols.
DP3: Real-time link health monitoring and alerting system.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Interaction between link monitoring and failover control
Dependency on network infrastructure and teleoperation control
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates link redundancy and failover mechanisms, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Risk of failover delay impacting link availability.
High safety criticality requires rigorous failover validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) tightly with failover to reduce failover latency.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: All hardware and software components responsible for teleoperation link management, including redundancy and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections used for teleoperation communication.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Status and health data of the teleoperation link sent to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands and control inputs received from NGHE Solution for teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of teleoperation link management functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module interacts with link but does not contain link management logic.
Receives alerts but does not manage link availability.
Coordinates overall system but link management is delegated.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management within the Teleoperation module minimizes interface complexity and diffusion of responsibility.
containment_risks: Potential single point of failure if Teleoperation module is compromised.
Interface dependencies with NGHE Solution and Safety Services must be robust.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Strengthen interface contracts and failover testing within Teleoperation to mitigate risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets availability requirements.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion as link management is contained within Teleoperation.
Some dependency on NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry coordination.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best IM boundary for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring link availability metrics and failover response times within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Integrate real-time monitoring DP more explicitly with failover DP in next decomposition level.
Define detailed interface protocols for Network Link and Telemetry.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, integrating real-time monitoring with failover mechanisms will improve robustness and reduce risk.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

revise.why: To incorporate real-time monitoring tightly with failover to reduce latency and improve availability.

assumptions: Teleoperation module can implement failover logic effectively.
open_risks: Interface robustness between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Test data on failover response times.
Verification of interface protocols and telemetry accuracy.
